title: BLACK+DECKER One Touch Coffee Grinder, 2/3 Cup Coffee Bean Capacity, Spice Grinder, One Touch Push-Button Control -150 Watts -Stainless Steel Blades
description:
About this item
STAINLESS STEEL BLADES AND BOWL - The sharp blades and durable grinding bowl are built to last, delivering uniform grinds with every use
GRIND YOUR FAVORITES! - Stainless steel blades quickly grind your favorite coffee beans, herbs, spices, grains, and more
ONE TOUCH PUSH-BUTTON CONTROL - Intuitive push-button control lets you easily customize the grind consistency, from coarse to fine
LID-LOCKING SAFETY FEATURE - No spills, no accidents. The integrated safety mechanism allows the blades to turn on only when the lid is securely locked
30%* BETTER GRINDING - This coffee grinder makes it simple to achieve the uniform grind that makes a delicious cup of coffee; Includes Coffee Grinder, Grinder Bowl
reviews_5s:
Very quick and quiet. Easy to use and functions very well. Great buy..This grinder is simple and very affordable! Works perfectly!I've purchased two of these over the past two years, one for me and one as a gift. These little machines get the job done. They don't take up a lot of space, and they grind quickly. The grounds sometimes cling to metal plate underneath the blades, but this is a small complaint. Really I just like having it for the infrequent times I want to make fresh coffee for guests.I recently purchased the BLACK+DECKER One Touch Coffee Grinder, and it has exceeded my expectations. Here’s why:

**Pros:**
1. **Ease of Use**: The one-touch push-button control is incredibly straightforward. You simply press the button, and the grinder does the rest, making it perfect for those early morning caffeine needs.
2. **Compact Size**: With its 2/3 cup capacity, this grinder is compact and doesn’t take up much counter space, which is ideal for smaller kitchens.
3. **Consistent Grind**: The stainless steel blades deliver a consistent grind, whether you prefer coarse or fine coffee grounds. This consistency improves the flavor and quality of my coffee.
4. **Durability**: The stainless steel construction feels sturdy and durable, promising longevity and reliable performance over time.
5. **Easy to Clean**: The design makes it easy to clean, ensuring that no coffee residue is left behind, which can affect the taste of future grinds.

**Cons:**
1. **Capacity Limitation**: While perfect for a couple of cups, the 2/3 cup capacity might be limiting for larger households or when entertaining guests who drink a lot of coffee.
2. **Noise Level**: Like most coffee grinders, it can be a bit noisy. Not a deal-breaker, but something to be aware of if you're sensitive to noise.

Overall, the BLACK+DECKER One Touch Coffee Grinder is a fantastic addition to my kitchen. It’s user-friendly, efficient, and provides a consistent grind every time. Highly recommended for anyone looking to enhance their coffee-making experience!Fast and easy!I like to grind up whole coffee beans and this grinder is doing the job with no issues so far. I grind a variety of beans at least once a week. Didn’t really want anything fancy wanted to keep it as simple as possible and easy to clean and this does that.I buy coffee from all over the Carribean when I'm on vacation several times a year and that gives me enough coffee beans to keep this grinder in use several times a week. I bought this in 2021 and it's still going strong. The moter is powerful and has never had a problem keeping up with a full lid of hard coffee beans. I highly recommend this grinder; it has been one of my best Amazon purchases.I love everything about this coffee grinder. Great price and value. It’s quiet, the blades are sharp so you can get the grind size you want. The chrome and black match the decor of my kitchen. It is perfect for my needs.I bought this to control the amount of salt in my family's diet. One of my family members has high blood pressure. I've been looking up recipes for our favorite seasonings and decided this would be a great way to control and cut the sodium count. This grinder was perfect!
I am looking forward to making lots of seasonings knowing that my family members can be rest assured that they can have flavor without worrying about their blood pressure spiking.Works and gets the job done
reviews_1s:
Bought this to replace one we used for about 3-4 years. Should have gotten that one again, but went for this due to the many good reviews. This has no inner cup, so once you grind the beans, you have to pour them out using the entire thing. It makes a big mess. Plus, there’s no measuring lines. This was very disappointingPlay Video
I tried it in 4 different outlets, no dice. Looks pretty but has no power. My husband, who can make anything work, fooled around with it (after I gave up) for half an hour, without success. Very disappointed. I purchased it because Black & Decker used to have quality products. This one is not that. Worse, we live n a rural location, 25 miles away from a UPS drop-off box. This means we will have to waste gas and time on getting this useless item returned for a refund!Worked great for one day! I go to use it two weeks later and it's not working. Replacement ordered! I already know this brand will not last long! Replacement got hot and stop working again! No more replacements given! DO NOT BUY IF YOU ARE GOING TO USE THIS LONGER THEN 10 MINUTES OR IF YOU ARE NOT GOING TO KEEP CHECKING TO SEE IF IT WORKS!!!It is incapable of doing what the description on Amazon says it can do. The description says that it can grind a variety of items and even shows it pictured with cinnamon sticks and fresh spices but when you read the directions that come with it, it specifically states that it can not grind those items and doing so will damage the unit. Since it couldn't do what I needed it to do, even though it was billed and being able to grind a large variety of items, I just packed it up and returned it. Extremely disappointing purchase but a great example of false advertising! I would've rated it no stars but was unable to submit review without pressing at least one.This coffee grinder seemed fine - a little messy to get the grinds out of, but not bad. Until this morning when it stopped working completely - we bought it 3 months ago! We tried different outlets, checking to make sure nothing was blocked, but no go. It doesn't do anything - no noise, no turning on, let alone spinning the blade. We bought this since we thought it was a reputable brand, but clearly not. Don't waste your money!Worked well for half a pound of beans… then stopped working!!! VERY DISAPPOINTED! I was not aloud to give it zero stars unfortunatelyBought as a gift. Return window closed 2 days ago. Finally heard from the recipient that the "stainless steel blades" advertised in the item description were not included with the grinder. Makes it pretty hard to grind coffee beans. Very surprised at Black & Decker.I measure my beans using the marks on the clear cap… bottom line = 4 cups, next line = 8 cups, etc. I then grind the beans and add them to the coffeemaker with the right amount of water.

While the grinder may function well, I won’t use it because there are no measurement marks on the cap.

I’m not going to add another step to my morning routine by having to figure out what the bean measurements are in cups, scoop that amount into the grinder top and grind the beans.

I’ve got to return this and find one like my 20 year old grinder for my elderly relative to easily use - measurement and scoop in 1 easy step.I had high hopes for this, I used it literally one other time for coffee a couple of weeks ago. I go to use it this morning (12/20/24), it worked for .1 second then stopped. Very disappointed.Only last for five minute,then stop working
